title: Golfers tee off in style at BMW Champions Golf Cup World Final on the enchanting Garden Route
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Golf enthusiasts from...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Golf enthusiasts from around the world are flocking to the Garden Route as the prestigious BMW Champions Golf Cup World Final takes place from 4 to 9 March at the renowned Fancourt Resort in George.


> This highly anticipated event is the pinnacle of the largest amateur golfing series globally, where national winners from approximately 30 participating countries will compete for victory.


The World Final offers amateur golfers the incredible opportunity to experience the thrill and ambiance of a major tournament.

Teeing off on the world-class "Outeniqua" and "Montagu" courses, skillfully designed by golfing legend Gary Player, the competitors will showcase their talents against the backdrop of breathtaking scenery.

As part of the festivities, BMW SA hosted a special event for all the finalists at Cruise Cafe in Knysna on 8 March.


> The finalists were treated to a luxurious boat trip aboard the esteemed Paddle Cruiser, adding an extra touch of opulence to their BMW Golf Cup experience.


The BMW Champions Golf Cup World Final is not only a celebration of the sport but also a testament to the enduring passion and dedication of amateur golfers worldwide.

The Garden Route is set to witness an extraordinary display of talent and camaraderie as participants strive for greatness and etch their names in the annals of this prestigious event.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
